name: hm1_extdel_interposer
drl:
rule TJ1 salience 5 when $a : E0() from entry-point "S1" $b : E2($t : tag, this before[0ms,50ms] $a) then insertLogical(new D($t)); end
rule RN salience 9 when not D() P() then end
rule R7 salience 7 when P() then end
rule RL salience 1 when P() then end
_finding: HALT ARC first move (2026-07-11, hm1): spin_deps_extdel + interposer R7@7. Oracle 3x: [TJ1, RN, R7, TJ1, RL] — RN@9 fires BEFORE the interposer => the external-delete belief drop lands PRE-PICK in a STREAM session (at the delete's propagation), NOT at a reopened pick. FALSIFIES the D-175/D-176 residual's 'Drools reopens the pick pre-fire' interpretation. Engine [TJ1, R7, TJ1, RL]: the drop lands mid-victim-pop-eval and RN is born-then-killed by the head fire's re-justification — the cf5x17 static return is CORRECT; the LANDING SITE is the defect. Same family as tju_spin_deps_{extdel,delpartner}; fix = stream delete-time propagation (D-138 pattern), pick machinery untouched. FIX validated-then-REVERTED at D-177 (tms_eager_break stream explicit-delete k>=2 lift — external at the action): this cell PASSES under it; graduates at the landing.
